text.title: growth-app-store-optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-app-store-optimization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Keyword stuffing: packing keywords unnaturally into the description or name (e.g., "todo task list checklist planner reminder organizer").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both stores penalize unnatural keyword repetition. Human-readable copy converts better and avoids algorithmic penalties.

failure-mode.description: Ignoring reviews for more than 48 hours.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unanswered negative reviews accumulate in visible positions and signal poor support. The window to convert a negative reviewer to a neutral one closes quickly.

failure-mode.description: Never updating the store listing after launch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both stores factor update frequency into ranking. Stale listings signal abandonment and hurt position over time.
